---
title: "Research"
---
<div class="research-section">
<h3>Published Papers</h3>
<p class="research-section-intro">Peer-reviewed publications, with links to papers, appendices, and replication materials where available.</p>
<ol class="research-list" reversed>
  <li>
    Difference-in-differences with as few as two cross-sectional units – A new perspective to the democracy-growth debate
    <span class="journal-note">(with Gilles Koumou)</span>
    <span class="status-badge">Forthcoming, Econometric Reviews</span>,
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2408.13047">[ArXiv]</a>,
    <a href="files/replication/2026_Koumou_Tsyawo.zip" class="download">[Replication Package]</a>
  </li>
  <li>
    <a href="https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/econometric-theory/article/consistent-icmbased-chi2-specification-test/DF98A874F40AA24D1414C62C4F2357C9">A Consistent ICM-based χ² Specification Test</a>,
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2208.13370.pdf">[ArXiv]</a>,
    <a href="files/appendices/2026_Jiang_Tsyawo_online_appendix.pdf" class="download" title="Download">[Online Appendix]</a>,
    <a href="files/replication/2026_Jiang_Tsyawo.zip" class="download" title=" ">[Replication Package]</a>,
    R Package: <a href="https://github.com/estsyawo/icmkit">[icmkit]</a>
    <span class="journal-note">(with Feiyu Jiang, <em>Econometric Theory</em>, 2026)</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <a href="https://academic.oup.com/ectj/advance-article-abstract/doi/10.1093/ectj/utac032/6888009?redirectedFrom=fulltext">Feasible IV Regression without Excluded Instruments</a>,
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2103.09621.pdf?">[ArXiv]</a>,
    <a href="files/appendices/2023_Tsyawo_online_appendix.pdf" class="download" title="Download">[Online Appendix]</a>,
    <a href="files/replication/2023_Tsyawo.zip" class="download" title=" ">[Replication Package]</a>,
    R Package: <a href="https://github.com/estsyawo/icmkit">[icmkit]</a>
    <span class="journal-note">(<em>The Econometrics Journal</em>, 2023)</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <a href="https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s12076-022-00310-y">Policy Spillover Effects on Student Achievement – Evidence from PISA</a>,
    <a href="files/appendices/2022_Gerstner_Tsyawo_online_appendix.pdf" class="download" title="Download">[Online Appendix]</a>,
    <a href="files/replication/2022_Gerstner_Tsyawo.zip" class="download" title=" ">[Replication Package]</a>
    <span class="journal-note">(with Clara-Christina Gerstner, <em>Letters in Spatial and Resource Sciences</em>, 2022)</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <a href="https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s12076-021-00276-3">Neighbourhood Effects and the Incidence of Child Labour</a>,
    <a href="files/papers/Gaku&Tsyawo_2020_11.pdf" class="download" title="Download">[Paper]</a>,
    <a href="files/appendices/2021_Gaku_Tsyawo_online_appendix.pdf" class="download" title="Download">[Online Appendix]</a>,
    <a href="files/replication/2021_Gaku_Tsyawo.zip" class="download" title=" ">[Replication Package]</a>
    <span class="journal-note">(with Sylvanus Gaku, <em>Letters in Spatial and Resource Sciences</em>, 2021)</span>
  </li>
</ol>
</div>

<div class="research-section">
<h3>Working Papers</h3>
<p class="research-section-intro">Current projects in circulation, including manuscripts under review and active collaborations.</p>
<ol class="research-list">
  <li>
    A Grid-Rate Condition for Valid Uniform Inference,
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.12284">[ArXiv]</a>
  </li>
  <li>
    Distributional Effects with Two-Sided Measurement Error: An Application to Intergenerational Income Mobility
    <span class="journal-note">(with Brantly Callaway, Tong Li and Irina Murtazashvili)</span>
    <span class="status-badge">Revise and resubmit</span>,
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2107.09235">[ArXiv]</a>
  </li>
  
  <li>
    Quantile and Distribution Treatment Effects on the Treated with Possibly Non-Continuous Outcomes
    <span class="journal-note">(with Nelly K. Djuazon)</span>,
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2408.07842">[ArXiv]</a>,
    <a href="files/appendices/2026_Djuazon_Tsyawo_online_appendix.pdf" class="download" title="Download">[Online Appendix]</a>,
    <a href="files/replication/2026_Djuazon_Tsyawo.zip" class="download">[Replication Package]</a>
  </li>
  
  <li>
    Beyond Parallel Trends: An Identification-Strategy-Robust Approach to Causal Inference with Panel Data
    <span class="journal-note">(with Brantly Callaway, Derek Dyal and Pedro H.C. Sant’Anna)</span>,
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2511.21977">[ArXiv]</a>
  </li>
  <li>
    Clustered Covariate Regression
    <span class="journal-note">(with Abdul-Nasah Soale)</span>,
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2302.09255.pdf">[ArXiv]</a>,
    R Package: <a href="https://estsyawo.github.io/cluscov/">[cluscov]</a>,
    <a href="files/replication/CCR_Replication_Package.zip" class="download">[Replication Package]</a>
  </li>
  <li>
    A Distance Covariance-based Estimator
    <span class="journal-note">(with Abdul-Nasah Soale)</span>,
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2102.07008.pdf">[ArXiv]</a>,
    <a href="files/replication/dCov_Replication_Package.zip" class="download">[Replication Package]</a>
  </li>
  <li>
    Treatment Effects in Staggered Adoption Designs with Non-Parallel Trends
    <span class="journal-note">(with Brantly Callaway)</span>,
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2308.02899.pdf">[ArXiv]</a>
  </li>
  <li>
    ICM-IV Regression with panel and clustered data
    <span class="journal-note">(with Feiyu Jiang)</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    Regression-Based Inference for Skewness and Kurtosis Coefficients
    <span class="journal-note">(with Jean-Marie Dufour and Abderrahim Taamouti)</span>
  </li>
</ol>
</div>

```{=html}
<!--

* [R&D spillover effects on firm innovation - Estimating the spatial matrix from panel data](https://estsyawo.github.io/files/papers/Tsyawo_JMP.pdf)
  + R Package: [RpacSPD](https://estsyawo.github.io/RpacSPD/)  

* Bayesian Distribution Regression (with Weige Huang), [[SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3048658)]
  + R Package: [bayesdistreg](https://estsyawo.github.io/bayesdistreg/index.html)

* [Recovering Distributions for the Estimation of Treatment Effects Under Partly Unobserved Treatment with Repeated Cross-Sections](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3194286) (status: working paper)

<!-- Commented out: -->
```
```{=html}
<!--
* <a href="Huang&Tsyawo2018_4.pdf#" class="download" title=" ">Bayesian Distribution Regression</a> [[Submitted]](with Weige Huang)
-->
```
<div class="research-section">
<h3>Work in Progress</h3>
<p class="research-section-intro">Projects in earlier stages of development.</p>
<ul class="research-list">
  <li>Space-Calibrated Estimation and Inference</li>
</ul>
</div>

```{=html}
<!--
-   Credit constraints and agricultural performance: Evidence from Nigeria (with Mahmoudou Alioum and Al-Mouksit Akim)
-->
```
